items.name_en: Includes full original retail packaging 💖 [New] MIU vintage underarm dumpling bag, new vintage-soft calfskin full of retro nostalgia, paired with steel aged metal hardware. Unique design looks good on everyone.

items.name_en: 💖Full Original Retail Packaging💖MIUMIU 24ss Autumn/Winter New Baguette Bag
items.name_cn:
💖Full Original Retail Packaging💖MIUMIU 24ss Autumn/Winter New Baguette Bag
The baguette design leads new trends, full of 'girly sentiment' centered around an intellectual vibe, a free-spirited and chic big sister style showing a casual attitude, revealing the unique charm of a Miu Miu girl. Just the right size, sweet yet spicy or cool and handsome, and the capacity meets daily needs. Good-looking and practical, it's hard not to love it!
Model: 5BD265.
Size: 28x11x15cm.
Color: Brown Full Leather/Original Leather.
Italian Creation

items.name_en: !!️Full Original Retail Packaging!!️【New】Arcadie Matelasse Sheepskin Medium Tote/Shoulder Bag~Black Leather
items.name_cn:
!!️Full Original Retail Packaging!!️【New】Arcadie Matelasse Sheepskin Medium Tote/Shoulder Bag~Black Leather
This handbag uses Matelasse craftsmanship, with a three-dimensional texture and exquisite feel bringing a new interpretation to the classic silhouette. The front letter logo cleverly echoes the metal hardware, exquisite workmanship is outstanding, showing a distinctive classic style. Dynamic and elegant lines paired with a detachable adjustable shoulder strap present a practical and versatile design with modern charm.
~Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
~Zip closure
~Lined with 2 slip pockets
~With foot studs
Model: 5BB124.
Size: W24×H17×D7.5cm
Color: Black Full Leather/Original Leather.
Italian Creation

specs.rawTitle:

This handbag uses Matelasse craftsmanship, with a three-dimensional texture and exquisite feel bringing a new interpretation to the classic silhouette. The front letter logo cleverly echoes the metal hardware, exquisite workmanship is outstanding, showing a distinctive classic style. Dynamic and elegant lines paired with a detachable adjustable shoulder strap present a practical and versatile design with modern charm.
~Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
~Zip closure
~Lined with 2 slip pockets
~With foot studs
Model: 5BB124.
Size: W24×H17×D7.5cm
Color: Black Full Leather/Original Leather.
Italian Creation
